original: Aside from the silky smoothness of the fabric and baggy comfort provided by these boxers, the stand-out features are the wide-open back end (shaped in a tasteful heart), and the upper band proudly declaring “Butt Boy” in day-glow pink around its circumference. The color is remappable with a free, ad-supported codex app.
